title: Lithium rebounds as supply side issues resurface
section_path: Lithium rebounds as supply side issues resurface
section_path_text: Lithium rebounds as supply side issues resurface
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Despite mixed economic data, a risk-on tone helped stem the selling earlier this week in commodity markets. Image reference: assets/2023-04-28_1z1d8wtpl2o9m1tladho5tu8cx6s2y_img_screenshot-20230428-122802-linkedin_1917a13b34a2.jpg
Copper was under pressure earlier in the session following Chinese data showing profits at industrial companies fell 19% in March. This was compounded by reports that Chinese copper processors were planning to reduce production for Q2 2023.
